title: API v2 Stable Release
description: Complete redesign with standardized resource paths, consistent pagination, and comprehensive type coverage.

title: Sprite URL Corrections
description: Fixed broken sprite URLs for generation 5+ Pokémon. All sprite endpoints now return valid HTTPS URLs.

title: Added Evolution Chain Details
description: Evolution chain endpoint now includes min_level, trigger type, and held item requirements for each evolution step.

title: Legacy v1 Endpoints Deprecated
description: All v1 API endpoints are now deprecated and will be removed in Q1 2025. Please migrate to v2.
